message:
feat(planner): implement skip scan index access path; add CAS concurrency tests

Skip scan optimization (fsqlite-planner):
- Implement SkipScanCandidate analysis for multi-column indexes when the
  leading column is unconstrained but has low cardinality (<=16 distinct values)
  and trailing columns have constraints
- Add OR-chain-to-IN-list conversion via collect_disjuncts() and
  classify_or_disjunction_as_in_list() for index probe expansion
- Integrate skip scan fallback into best_access_path_internal() with
  probe-count-adjusted cost estimation
- Add constants for selectivity, max leading distinct, and pages-per-distinct
- Add 6 new tests covering IN-list classification, skip scan acceptance/
  rejection, and OR disjunction index probe paths

CAS metrics and concurrency testing (fsqlite-mvcc):
- Add first_attempt_count() and first_attempt_ratio() helpers to
  CasMetricsSnapshot for lock-free contention pattern analysis
- Add 64-thread stress test validating >=95% first-attempt ratio under
  moderate contention (256 installs per thread, bd-688.3 acceptance)
- Add loom model checker test verifying linearizable publish-subscribe
  semantics of chain head CAS operations under weak memory ordering
- Add loom 0.7.2 dev-dependency

Housekeeping:
- Alphabetize imports in codegen.rs, observability.rs, invariants.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
